market_context: Risk-off Tuesday: 'Nasdaq Dips Over 400 Points Amid Renewed US-Iran Tensions: Greed Index Remains In Fear Zone' (07-14) and 'Critical 4 Hours Ahead, Korea And Iran Drive Selling In US Stocks' (07-13). VOO 688.60, mid 30d range 667-698. Data pull PARTIAL for the 8th consecutive run: fundamentals failed for all 7 tickers (proxy 403), prices+headlines intact — sector caps remain unenforceable, so any buy would be rejected sector-unknown. Portfolio 100% cash; holdings-only web sweep not applicable. Every ticker's headline list was non-empty today. JNJ and UNH Q2 prints imminent this week. All holds.

signals.thesis: Split tape: 'Keybanc Downgrades Apple to Underweight, $250 PT' vs 'Apple Defies Smartphone Slump With Record Market Share' (both 07-14); the market-share print is the only hard datapoint and it is positive. Price 317.34 at the top of the 30d range (275-317). Epic app-store fee battle re-escalating (07-13) is a fee-revenue risk. Falsified toward buy if a second independent demand datapoint confirms share gains; toward sell if App Store fee ruling goes against Apple.
